jobs.title: Customer Service Representative (6-month Contract)
jobs.content: <p><strong>Customer Service Representative</strong></p><p>Collective Health is the integrated employer-sponsored health-benefits platform pioneered around the unified-claims-and-care-navigation data model.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Lead Collective Health's Engineering function across the integrated employer-health-benefits platform stack & care-navigation infrastructure.</p>
